prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response:
★★☆☆☆  
Title: “Overhyped alarm clock with mandatory DLC”  
Woke up right on time—0/10 would not recommend. Packaging (dreams) vanished instantly, setup required full verticality and bladder management, and the built-in sunshine is unadjustably bright. No snooze button, no returns, and the day it unlocks is just unpaid labor with ads. Two stars only because consciousness is technically functional and the vendor refuses refunds.
